title: cacalia psilophylla
intro: Cacalia psilophylla, also known as the Japanese or Asian wild geranium, is a perennial plant belonging to the family Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Cacalia psilophylla has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as having antimicrobial and antiviral properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tea or tincture, and it can also be dried and used as an herbal powder or added to other herbal formulas for its medicinal properties.
